hero.headline:
One request.
Multiple quotes.
hero.subheadline: Tell us what's wrong with your car. Nearby shops compete to give you their best price.

feature1.headline: Describe the issue, set your radius
feature1.body: Enter your car details and describe the problem. Shops within your chosen radius get notified instantly. No phone calls needed.

feature2.headline: Compare quotes side by side
feature2.body: Each shop sends a detailed quote privately. You see every price and distance on one screen.

feature3.headline: Manage requests from your dashboard
feature3.body: Browse incoming requests, ask drivers questions, and send quotes. Everything in one place.

shopCallout.headline: Win customers in your area
shopCallout.desc: Drivers nearby send repair requests. You quote directly in the app. No middlemen, no commission.
shopCallout.benefit1Desc: Every request is from a driver who needs a repair now.
shopCallout.benefit2Desc: Chat with the driver in-app before you commit to a price.
shopCallout.benefit3Desc: You only see requests from drivers within your service area.
shopCallout.benefit4Desc: Flat monthly fee. Zero commission. No surprises.
shopCallout.noteText: already use Autoceny. Join and start receiving requests today.

bottomCta.headline: Your next repair starts here
bottomCta.body: One request, multiple quotes, your choice.

pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.subtitle: For drivers and shops
pricing.freeDesc: Everything you need to get started.
pricing.premiumDesc: More requests, more questions, no ceilings.
pricing.shopDesc: Receive requests from your area and send quotes.
pricing.shopDisclaimer: Lead volume depends on your area and demand.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: How is the search radius calculated?
faq.a1: We use your location or entered address as the center and find every shop within the distance you set, measured as a straight-line radius in kilometers.
faq.a2: Completely free. You can create requests and receive quotes at no cost.
faq.q3: Do shops see each other's quotes?
faq.a3: No. Each shop's quote is private. Only the driver can see and compare all quotes.
faq.q4: When do I see a shop's phone number?
faq.a4: Once a shop sends a quote and opts to share their number, you'll see it on their quote card.
faq.q5: Can I close a request early?
faq.a5: Anytime. Existing quotes stay visible, but no new ones will come in.
faq.q6: What happens after I mark a shop as 'Interested'?
faq.a6: The shop gets notified. If they shared their phone number, you'll see it right away and can contact them directly.
faq.q7: How quickly will I receive quotes?
faq.a7: Most shops respond within a few hours. Timing depends on shop availability in your area and the type of repair.
faq.q8: What types of repairs can I get quotes for?
faq.a8: Anything from brakes and suspension to electronics and bodywork. Describe the issue and shops will let you know if they can help.
faq.q9: How can a shop join the platform?
faq.a9: Click 'Join as a Shop', fill in your details, and activate your account. Takes a few minutes.
faq.a10: Your contact details are never shared without your consent. Shops only see the issue description, car details, and location.

contact.headline: Have questions? Reach out
contact.subtitle: We typically reply within one business day.
